# Copilot Instructions for tripflow

This repository contains the **tripflow** travel planning application.

## General Guidelines

- Follow existing code style and conventions in the repository.
- Write clear, concise commit messages.
- Keep changes focused and minimal — avoid unrelated modifications.
- Document any non-obvious logic with inline comments.

## Testing

- Write tests for new features and bug fixes.
- Ensure all existing tests pass before submitting changes.

## Pull Requests

- Provide a clear description of the changes and the motivation behind them.
- Reference any related issues in the pull request description.
